ddls:
CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "youtuber" TEXT /* Name of the YouTube channel */,
  "subscribers" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers */,
  "video_views" TEXT /* Total video views */,
  "video_count" INTEGER /* Number of videos */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the channel belongs to */,
  "started" INTEGER /* Year the channel was created */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the channel */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the channel */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the channel's thumbnail image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the channel's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., subscribers, video views) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* User-friendly name for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_metrics" (
  "channel_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel metric */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score indicating the reliability of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_metrics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the analytic belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Calculated value of the metric (e.g., growth rate) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytic was calculated */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the analytic */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the calculated value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the analytic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel */,
  "collaborating_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating channel */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was recorded */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., guest appearance, co-hosting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_collaborations_collaborating_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborating_channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_collaborations_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_cross_promotions" (
  "cross_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-promotion */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel */,
  "cross_promoting_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cross-promoting channel */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the cross-promotion was recorded */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of cross-promotion (e.g., shoutout, featured video) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the cross-promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cross_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_cross_promotions_cross_promoting_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("cross_promoting_channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_cross_promotions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_shared_content" (
  "shared_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared content */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel */,
  "shared_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared channel */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content shared (e.g., video, playlist) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the content was shared */,
  "content_title" TEXT /* Title of the shared content */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL to the shared content */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the shared content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shared_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_shared_content_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_shared_content_shared_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score indicating the reliability of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_history_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
